metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\fs24{\fs48\b MC Scripts\b}\line\line Unified ReaPack repository for REAPER scripts developed by MC Scripts.\line\line Import this ReaPack repository:\line\line \i\ul text https://github.com/Echo722/MC-Scripts/raw/main/index.xml \ul0\i0 \line\line Scripts install under:\line\line \i\ul text REAPER/Scripts/MC Scripts Release/<script-folder>/ \ul0\i0 \line\line {\fs24\b Packages\b}\line\line {\par \bullet\tab MediaEye: Media Explorer album art viewer for embedded and sidecar cover images.\line }\line {\fs24\b Release Convention\b}\line\line Packages in this repository use:\line\line {\par \bullet\tab Author: \i\ul MC Scripts\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Repository name: \i\ul MC Scripts Release\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Category: \i\ul <script-folder>\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Source file paths: direct package files such as \i\ul MediaEye.lua\ul0\i0 \line }\line }

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Move the ReaPack install path to MC Scripts Release/MediaEye so MC Scripts releases are grouped together.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Pin On Top now stays topmost only while REAPER is the foreground app, so it no longer covers other programs (e.g. a browser) when you switch away, and it re-pins automatically when REAPER regains focus. ---- Pin On Top(置顶)改为仅在 REAPER 处于前台时生效,切到浏览器等其它程序时不再遮挡,切回 REAPER 时自动重新置顶。

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Always-on smart pinning: the window stays on top only inside REAPER and hides itself automatically while another application is in the foreground, reappearing pinned when REAPER returns. The Pin On Top toggle button has been removed. ---- 置顶改为始终开启的智能行为:仅在 REAPER 内保持最上层,切到其它程序时窗口自动隐藏,切回 REAPER 自动恢复置顶;移除 Pin On Top 开关按钮。

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Cover priority: an image explicitly named as cover art (Artwork/Cover/Folder/Front/...) found on the folder chain now wins over the embedded picture. Fixes packs (e.g. SwishSwoosh) that embed a label logo into every file while the real pack cover sits in the root as Artwork.png. Unnamed nearby images still rank below the embedded picture. ---- 封面优先级调整:文件夹链上找到明确以 Artwork/Cover/Folder/Front 等命名的封面图时,优先于音频内嵌图显示(修复 SwishSwoosh 等每个文件都内嵌厂牌 logo 而真封面在根目录 Artwork.png 的包);未明确命名的普通图片仍低于内嵌图。

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: The window now stays above the Media Explorer only, instead of above every REAPER window: clicking an FX (or any other) window brings it over the cover art as usual, so large plugin UIs are no longer obstructed. The above-ME ordering is maintained natively by Windows (owner attachment), so clicking around the Media Explorer causes no flicker. Hiding when another application is in the foreground is unchanged. ---- 窗口置顶范围收窄:只保持在 Media Explorer 之上,不再压住所有 REAPER 窗口——点击 FX 等其它窗口可正常盖住封面图,大插件界面不再被挡;在 ME 上层的排序由 Windows 原生维持(owner 挂接),点击 ME 无闪烁;切到其它程序时自动隐藏的行为保持不变。
